name: 签名校验
description: 签名校验模块，校验APK安装包和所有已加载模块的签名状态（区分官方签名和开发者签名），展示开发者信息、签名指纹、签名主体，确保应用和模块的完整性与合法性
description_en: Verify APK and module signatures (official & developer), display fingerprints and developer info to ensure integrity

apis.name: verifyApk
apis.desc: 校验当前APK安装包的签名信息，返回签名证书指纹、包名、签发者
apis.desc_en: Verify APK signature, returns certificate fingerprint, package name and issuer

apis.name: verifyModule
apis.desc: 校验指定模块的签名，区分官方签名和开发者签名，返回签名类型、开发者信息、签名指纹
apis.desc_en: Verify a specific module signature, distinguishing official and developer signatures, returns signature type, developer info and fingerprint

apis.name: verifyAllModules
apis.desc: 校验设备上所有已安装模块的签名，逐个列出校验结果，包含签名类型和开发者信息
apis.desc_en: Verify signatures of all installed modules, listing results with signature type and developer info

apis.name: verifyAll
apis.desc: 一次性校验APK安装包签名和全部模块签名，返回完整报告（含签名类型、开发者信息）
apis.desc_en: Verify both APK and all module signatures at once, returns a full report with signature types and developer info
